60.3 - Beneficiaries Who Are Part A Only or Part B Only 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3122.1, HHA-212.4 

If a beneficiary is enrolled only in Part A and qualifies for the Medicare home health 
benefit, then all of the home health services are financed under Part A. The 100-visit 
limit does not apply to beneficiaries who
